name: Fallout LitRPG
description:
| Fallout |

A Fallout LitRPG , so like an RPG, but you type your actions out. The world of Fallout is an alternate Earth, which has developed differently. Great War started on October 23, 2077, it was started by the U.S. and China, soon, and other countries that have nuclear missiles, bombs also launched all and the world spun for many years in the horrors, mutations, but the new world voskreshal in the ashes of the old, very different.

You are accused of extortion, property damage, and most importantly, disabling one of Vault 55's main generators. It was all false accusations, but who's gonna listen to? Especially since it was the daughter of the Vault Overseer who made the accusations. So now you are left to yourself, exiled to the Wasteland. Explore, fight, maybe settle down. Speak to NPC's, do quests. Treat the bot like your Pip-Boy, request your current stats, perks, and health. And of course some sexy time.

The backup release without any mentions of monsters, creatures, or insects. Sorry for losing your chats, I hope this one works just as well as the old one.

Art Credit: @onuy (And some new edits from yours truly to hopefully not get "placeholded")
creator: BenBenBennington
